name: meeting-prep-followup
description: Prepare meeting agendas with context, generate post-meeting summaries, track action items, and ensure follow-through
objectives: Generate meeting agendas with relevant project context
Compile pre-read materials and data points for attendees
Produce structured meeting notes with decisions and action items
Create follow-up tasks from action items with assignments
Track action item completion across meetings
prerequisites: Project context available for agenda topics
Previous meeting notes accessible (if recurring meeting)

procedure.description: Build agenda and gather context for the meeting
commands: IDENTIFY meeting type (standup, sprint review, client sync, planning)
PULL relevant project metrics and status updates
CHECK action items from previous meeting of same type
COMPILE open decisions that need resolution
LIST topics requiring discussion with time estimates
GATHER data/visuals needed for presentation
procedure.expectedOutput: Meeting agenda with context and pre-read materials

procedure.description: Format the agenda with time allocation
commands: ORGANIZE topics by priority (decisions first, FYIs last)
ALLOCATE time per topic based on complexity
ASSIGN topic owners/presenters
ADD carryover items from previous meetings
INCLUDE parking lot for deferred topics
procedure.expectedOutput: Structured agenda with time blocks and owners

procedure.description: Generate meeting summary from notes or transcript
commands: CAPTURE key decisions made during meeting
EXTRACT action items with owners and deadlines
NOTE topics deferred to next meeting
SUMMARIZE discussion highlights per agenda item
IDENTIFY follow-up meetings or escalations needed
procedure.expectedOutput: Structured meeting summary with decisions and action items

procedure.description: Convert action items into tracked tasks
commands: CREATE tasks for each action item with assignee and due date
LINK tasks to relevant project or milestone
SET priority based on meeting context
TAG tasks as meeting-originated for tracking
SCHEDULE follow-up check on action items
procedure.expectedOutput: Action items created as tasks in project system

procedure.description: Monitor action item completion before next meeting
commands: CHECK completion status of previous meeting action items
FLAG overdue action items for escalation
PREPARE carryover list for next meeting
CALCULATE action item completion rate
NOTIFY owners of approaching deadlines
procedure.expectedOutput: Action item status report with carryover items

criteria: Agenda covers all necessary topics with time allocation
Meeting summary captures all decisions accurately
Every action item has an owner and deadline

testScenarios.test: Generate agenda for a sprint planning session
testScenarios.expected: Agenda includes backlog items, velocity data, capacity

testScenarios.test: Check action items from 3 previous meetings
testScenarios.expected: Status report showing completed, pending, and overdue items

successIndicators: No action items lost between meetings

commonErrors.solution: Generate agenda from project status alone, note first meeting

commonErrors.error: Meeting notes too vague for action item extraction
commonErrors.solution: Generate clarifying questions for meeting organizer

rollbackProcedure: SAVE draft agenda/summary for manual completion
escalationCriteria: Critical decisions not documented or unclear
Action items repeatedly carried over without completion
Meeting outcomes conflict with project plan

successMetrics.name: Agenda Preparation Time
successMetrics.measurement: Time from trigger to completed agenda

successMetrics.name: Action Item Tracking
successMetrics.measurement: Action items created as tasks vs total identified

successMetrics.name: Follow-Through Rate
successMetrics.measurement: Action items completed by next meeting

agentInterfaces.message: Fetch meeting details and attendees for preparation
Create action item tasks from meeting outcomes
